header.v: Dòng trên chứng từ thay thế

action.text:
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @d0 smalldatetime, @d1 smalldatetime select @d0 = @$ngay_ct0, @d1 = @$ngay_ct1
create table #r(line_nbr0 int, line_nbr1 int) set @q = 'insert into #r(line_nbr0) select line_nbr from d81$' + convert(char(6), @d0, 112) + ' where stt_rec = ''' + replace(@$stt_rec0, '''', '''''') + '''' + case when @curLine <> '' then ' and line_nbr not in (' + replace(@curLine, '''', '''''') + ')' else '' end exec sp_executesql @q
if @$stt_rec1 <> '' begin set @q = 'update #r set line_nbr1 = b.line_nbr from #r a join d81$' + convert(char(6), @d1, 112) + ' b on a.line_nbr0 = b.line_nbr where b.stt_rec = ''' + replace(@$stt_rec1, '''', '''''') + '''' exec sp_executesql @q end
update #r set line_nbr1 = 0 where line_nbr1 is null
select '' as array$, * from #r order by line_nbr0 return

title.v: Thêm dòng theo chứng từ gốc$$90
